final:
module top_module(
    input clk, // clock input
    input reset, // reset input
    output reg [3:0] unused_count // 4-bit output port
);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        unused_count <= 4'b0000; // reset unused_count to 0
    end else begin
        if (unused_count == 4'b1001) begin
            unused_count <= 4'b0000; // reset unused_count to 0 when it reaches 9
        end else begin
            unused_count <= unused_count + 1; // increment unused_count by 1
        end
    end
end

endmodule
